zh.lifeSummary: 當Samuel Randall於1695年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克薩可時，他的父親Richard Randall Jr.36歲，母親Elizabeth Tozier36歲。他於1720年11月30日與Elizabeth Maxfield在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1765年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德索莫斯沃斯享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Samuel Randall于1695年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克薩可时，他的父亲Richard Randall Jr.36岁，母亲Elizabeth Tozier36岁。他于1720年11月30日与Elizabeth Maxfield在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1765年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德索莫斯沃斯享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Randall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): common colloquial pronunciation of   Randolph  .

variants.name: Randell
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Americanized form of German   Randel  .

variants.name: Randon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel.
English: probably a variant of Randall , with assimilation of n-l to n-n.
French (northern): from the ancient Germanic personal name Rando, a short form of names based on the element rand ‘rim (of a shield), shield’.

variants.name: Randol
meanings: English: altered form of   Randall  .

variants.name: Randal
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Randal in Gulen, a compound of Old Norse runnr ‘copse, thicket, grove’ + dalr ‘valley’.

variants.name: Randles
meanings: English and Irish (Louth): variant of Randall , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In Ireland this is sometimes a variant of Reynolds .

variants.name: Randle
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Americanized form of German Randel or of its Bavarian variant Randl.

variants.name: Rendell
meanings: English (Somerset, Devon, and Dorset): variant of   Randall  .

variants.name: Randel
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
South German: variant of   Rand   3.

variants.name: Randolph
meanings: English and German: from Randolf, an ancient Germanic personal name composed of the elements rand ‘rim (of a shield), shield’ + wolf ‘wolf’. This was introduced into England by the Normans in Old French forms of two different ancient Germanic personal names which became confused with each other: Randulf (from rand ‘(shield-)edge’ + wulf ‘wolf’) and Rannulf (from hraf(a)n ‘raven’ + wulf ‘wolf’).

History: An American family bearing this surname are descended from William Randolph (c. 1651–1711), a planter and merchant, a member of a family that originally came from Sussex, England. William Randolph emigrated from Warwickshire to VA c. 1673. He was a forebear of Thomas Jefferson and Robert E. Lee. Randolph had seven sons, each of whom inherited an estate, the name of which was sometimes added to their own, such as Sir John Randolph of Tazewell. His great-grandsons included Edmund Randolph (1753–1813), first attorney general of the US and one of the framers of the US Constitution, and the diplomat and statesman John Randolph of Roanoke (1773–1833), who served as US minister to Russia.

variants.name: Rendall
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Scottish: habitational name from Rendall (Orkney), named with a stream-name of uncertain origin + Old Norse dalr ‘valley’.
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of Swedish   Rendahl  .

nameMeanings.name: Samuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (Hebrew Shemuel), possibly meaning ‘He (God) has hearkened’ (presumably to the prayers of a mother for a son). It may also be understood as a contracted form of Hebrew sha'ulme'el meaning ‘asked of God’. In the case of Samuel the son of Hannah, this would be more in keeping with his mother's statement ‘Because I have asked him of the Lord’ (1 Samuel 1:20). Living in the 11th century bc , Samuel was a Hebrew judge and prophet of the greatest historical importance, who established the Hebrew monarchy, anointing as king both Saul and, later, David. In the Authorized Version two books of the Old Testament are named after him, although in Roman Catholic and Orthodox versions of the Bible they are known as the first and second Book of Kings. The story of Samuel being called by God while still a child serving in the house of Eli the priest (1 Samuel 3) is of great vividness and has moved countless generations. In England and America the name was particularly popular among the 16th-century Puritans and among Nonconformists from the 17th to the 19th century. It became fashionable again in the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Samuel Randall was born in 1695, in Saco, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Richard Randall Jr., was 36 and his mother, Elizabeth Tozier, was 36. He married Elizabeth Maxfield on 30 November 1720, in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1765, in Somersworth, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Samuel Randall est né en 1695, à Saco, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Richard Randall Jr., avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Tozier, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Maxfield le 30 novembre 1720, à Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1765, à Somersworth, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 70 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Randall è nato il nel 1695 nel Saco, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Richard Randall Jr., aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Tozier, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Maxfield il 30 novembre 1720, nel Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1765, nel Somersworth, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Samuel Randallが1695年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークサコで生まれた時，父Richard Randall Jr.は36歳，母Elizabeth Tozierは36歳であった。1720年11月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードドバーでElizabeth Maxfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1765年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードソメルスウオルスで70歳で死去した。

ko.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버
ko.Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 뉴버이

ko.Saco, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 사코
ko.Kittery, York, Massachusetts Bay, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 키터이
ko.Somersworth, Strafford, New Hampshire, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 서머스워스
ko.lifeSummary: Samuel Randall(이)가 1695년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 사코에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Randall Jr.(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Tozier(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1720년 11월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버에서 Elizabeth Maxfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1765년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 서머스워스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Randall nasceu em 1695, em Saco, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Richard Randall Jr., tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Tozier, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Maxfield em 30 de novembro de 1720, em Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1765, em Somersworth, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Samuel Randall родился в 1695 г. в местности сако, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Richard Randall Jr. было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Tozier, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Maxfield 30 ноября 1720 г. в местности довир, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1765 г. в местности сомирсворт, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Samuel Randall nació en 1695, en Saco, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Richard Randall Jr., tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Tozier, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Maxfield el 30 de noviembre de 1720, en Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1765, en Somersworth, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 70 años.
